text:
Bank has conscientiously summed up the lessons of the Asian finan-
                                                                                                                    cial crisis and the global financial crisis, profoundly analyzed the
                                                                                                                    changes in domestic and international economic and social situa-
                                                                                                                    tions, and actively explored new ways of reform and development in
                                                                                                                    strict line with the country’s long- and mid-term development strat-
                                                                                                                    egy. Concentrating on the principal contradiction, CDB has endeav-
                                                                                                                    ored to realize the government’s goals by relying on market-oriented
                                                                                                                    operations and has persistently abided by the standards of first-class
                                                                                                                    international banks. During its operation, it always combines mod-
                                                                                                                    ern civilization with good traditions, draws on international experi-
                                                                                                                    ence based on China’s reality, focuses on economic efficiency
                                                                                                                    without neglecting social responsibility, and energetically supports
                                                                                                                    economic and social development while guarding against financial
                                                                                                                    risks; it simplifies complex problems, systemizes simple issues and
                                                                                                                    clearly recognizes its own advantages and disadvantages.
